title: Array
description: Fundamental collection of elements stored at contiguous memory locations.

subtopics.title: Two-Pointer
subtopics.description: Use two indices that move towards or away from each other to reduce redundant comparisons.

subtopics.title: Sliding Window
subtopics.description: Maintain a window of fixed size or expand/shrink it to satisfy a condition.

problems.title: Maximum Sum Subarray of Size K

subtopics.title: Prefix Sum
subtopics.description: Precompute cumulative sums so any subarray or range sum can be answered in O(1).

problems.title: Matrix Block Sum (Running Sum of 2D Array)

subtopics.title: Kadane’s Algorithm
subtopics.description: Track the best subarray sum ending at each index and update the global maximum.

problems.title: Maximum Absolute Sum of Any Subarray

title: Strings
description: Sequence of characters and common string manipulation patterns.

subtopics.title: Two-Pointer (Palindrome)
subtopics.description: Compare characters from both ends and move inward until the condition fails.

subtopics.title: Sliding Window (String)
subtopics.description: Maintain a moving window and adjust its size to satisfy character constraints.

problems.title: Find All Anagrams in a String
Substring with Concatenation of All Words

title: Binary Search
description: Efficient search algorithm that divides the search interval in half.

subtopics.title: Classic Binary Search
subtopics.description: Divide-and-conquer → narrow search space in sorted array.

problems.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array

subtopics.title: Lower / Upper Bound
subtopics.description: Find first/last occurrence or smallest/largest index satisfying a condition.

problems.title: Find First and Last Position of Element

subtopics.title: Binary Search on Answers
subtopics.description: Treat answer space as sorted → binary search to find minimum/maximum feasible value.

problems.title: Capacity To Ship Packages Within D Days
Min Speed to Arrive on Time
Min number of days to make m bouquets

subtopics.title: Search in 2D Matrix
subtopics.description: Apply binary search row-wise / column-wise or flattened array.

problems.title: Kth Smallest Element in Sorted Matrix

title: Stack
description: LIFO (Last In First Out) data structure patterns.

subtopics.title: Monotonic Stack
subtopics.description: Maintain a monotonic increasing/decreasing stack to find next/prev greater/smaller, histogram ranges, or collisions.

subtopics.title: Expression Evaluation
subtopics.description: Use two stacks or postfix evaluation to handle numbers and operators efficiently.

subtopics.title: Stack Simulation / Undo Operation
subtopics.description: Simulate operations using a stack → pop on undo, remove adjacent duplicates, collapse characters.

problems.title: Minimum String Length After Removing Substrings

subtopics.title: Parenthesis & Scoring
subtopics.description: Push opening symbols and validate closing ones; sometimes track count or score.

problems.title: Minimum Add to Make Parentheses Valid

subtopics.title: Stack-Based Design
subtopics.description: Use two stacks to implement another data structure or maintain extra info.

subtopics.title: Stack + Greedy
subtopics.description: Combine stack properties with greedy choices to optimize strings or numbers.

problems.title: Minimum Remove to Make Valid Parentheses

subtopics.title: Recursive Stack
subtopics.description: Handle top/head element recursively → recurse on remaining stack/list → combine/insert results.

title: Recursion
description: Solving problems by breaking them down into smaller, self-similar subproblems.

subtopics.title: Linear Recursion
subtopics.description: Solve problems by reducing them to a simpler instance of the same problem.

subtopics.title: Non-Linear Recursion
subtopics.description: Make multiple recursive calls at each step to explore different branches and combine their results.

subtopics.title: Divide & Conquer
subtopics.description: Divide the problem into smaller subproblems, solve them recursively, and combine results.

subtopics.title: Recursion on LinkedList/Stack
subtopics.description: Process data structures recursively by handling the first/last element and recursing on the rest.

subtopics.title: Subsequences
subtopics.description: Explore all possible subsets by choosing to include or exclude each element.

title: Linked List
description: Linear data structure where elements are not stored at contiguous memory locations.

subtopics.title: Basic Operations
subtopics.description: Directly manipulate pointers to insert, delete, traverse, and get length.

problems.title: Insert at Head / Tail / Nth Position

subtopics.title: Fast and Slow Pointers
subtopics.description: Use two pointers at different speeds to detect cycles, middle node, or duplicates.

subtopics.title: Reversal Pattern
subtopics.description: Reverse entire list, partial list, or groups to reorder nodes.

problems.title: Reverse Linked List II (between m & n)

subtopics.title: Merge / Sort
subtopics.description: Merge sorted lists, sort list using merge sort, or reorder using middle + reverse + merge.

subtopics.title: Linked List + Stack
subtopics.description: Use a stack to handle backward traversal, carry logic, or next greater node.

problems.title: Next Greater Node in Linked List

title: Double Linked List
description: Linked List with navigation in both forward and backward directions.

subtopics.title: Basic DLL Operations
subtopics.description: Maintain prev and next pointers carefully for insert, delete, traversal; use DLL + HashMap for O(1) cache operations.

problems.title: Insert a node in a doubly Linkedlist
Delete a node from a doubly Linkedlist

subtopics.title: Merge / Sort / Reorder
subtopics.description: Use DLL properties (prev/next) to efficiently merge, sort, reorder, flatten, or perform pointer-based checks.

title: HashMap
description: Key-value pair data structure for O(1) average time complexity lookups.

subtopics.title: Frequency Map / Counting
subtopics.description: Count elements to find majority, top-k frequent, or sort by frequency.

subtopics.title: Prefix-Sum with Map
subtopics.description: Track cumulative sums; map stores first occurrence → solve subarray sum problems.

subtopics.title: Sliding Window + HashMap
subtopics.description: Maintain counts in a moving window → expand/shrink → track longest/shortest satisfying condition.

problems.title: Find All Anagrams in a String
Longest Substring with At Most K Distinct Characters

title: Heap
description: Priority Queue data structure for efficient retrieval of highest/lowest priority elements.

subtopics.title: Top-K Elements
subtopics.description: Use min-heap for top-k largest, max-heap for top-k smallest → maintain heap of size k.

problems.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array

subtopics.title: Merge K Sorted
subtopics.description: Use min-heap to merge multiple sorted arrays/lists efficiently.

problems.title: Find K Pairs with Smallest Sums
Smallest Range Covering Elements from K Lists

subtopics.title: Heap with Sliding Window
subtopics.description: Maintain a heap of elements in the window → pop outdated elements → track maximum.

subtopics.title: Implementation of Heap
subtopics.description: Design heap.

subtopics.title: Huffman pattern
subtopics.description: Repeatedly combine the two smallest elements to minimize the total cost..

problems.title: Combine Cards / Numbers with Minimum Cost

title: Tree
description: Hierarchical data structure with a root value and subtrees of children.

subtopics.title: DFS Traversals
subtopics.description: Standard DFS → used for max depth, path sums, subtree calculations.

problems.title: Minimum Height of a Binary Tree
Print All Nodes at Distance K
Boundary Traversal of a Binary Tree
Top View of a Binary Tree

subtopics.title: BFS / Level-Order
subtopics.description: Use queue → traverse level by level → calculate sums, averages, or side views.

problems.title: Average of Levels in Binary Tree
Binary Tree Zigzag Level Order Traversal

subtopics.title: Lowest Common Ancestor
subtopics.description: DFS recursion or parent-pointer mapping → find common ancestor efficiently.

problems.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of Binary Tree
Distance Between Two Nodes in a Tree

subtopics.title: Serialization / Construction
subtopics.description: Preorder / level-order encode-decode → reconstruct tree or flatten.

problems.title: Flatten Binary Tree to Linked List
Construct Binary Tree from Preorder & Inorder

title: Binary Search Tree
description: Tree data structure where left child < root < right child.

subtopics.title: BST Operations
subtopics.description: Leverage BST property (left < root < right) for search, insertion, deletion, and range queries.

problems.title: Maximum sum BST in binary Tree

subtopics.title: LCA & Range Queries
subtopics.description: Use BST property → traverse from root to find split point → LCA.

problems.title: Distance Between Two Nodes in BST

title: Graph
description: Non-linear data structure consisting of nodes and edges.

subtopics.title: BFS (Unweighted Path)
subtopics.description: Standard BFS → track distance/levels → queue-based traversal → multi-source if needed.

subtopics.title: DFS (Connectivity)
subtopics.description: DFS recursion or stack → track visited → identify connected components or detect cycles.

problems.title: All paths from source to target

subtopics.title: Topological Sort
subtopics.description: DFS postorder or BFS (Kahn’s algorithm) → order nodes respecting dependencies.

subtopics.title: MST / Union-Find
subtopics.description: Use Kruskal’s / Prim’s algorithm or Union-Find → find MST, minimum cost connections, or detect cycles.

problems.title: Number of Connected Components in Graph

subtopics.title: Dijkstra (Weighted)
subtopics.description: Use priority queue → relax edges → track shortest distances.

subtopics.title: Bellman-Ford
subtopics.description: Relax all edges V-1 times → detect negative cycles.

problems.title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops (Bellman-Ford variant)
Find the City With the Smallest Number of Neighbors at a Threshold Distance

subtopics.title: Floyd-Warshall
subtopics.description: DP over adjacency matrix → shortest paths between all pairs of nodes.

title: Backtracking
description: Algorithmic technique for solving problems recursively by trying to build a solution incrementally.

subtopics.title: Choice-Based Backtracking
subtopics.description: It is commonly used in problems that ask to generate all possible combinations, subsets, or permutations.

subtopics.title: Constraint-Based Backtracking
subtopics.description: At each step, choose whether to include an element → explore all subsets/choices recursively.

problems.title: Partition to K Equal Sum Subsets

subtopics.title: Grid / Path Backtracking
subtopics.description: Move in grid recursively → explore all valid paths → backtrack after each move.

subtopics.title: Decision Tree / Sequence Generation
subtopics.description: Generate sequences or strings recursively by making a choice at each step.

problems.title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number

title: Greedy
description: Algorithm paradigm that follows the problem solving heuristic of making the locally optimal choice.

subtopics.title: Intervals & Reach
subtopics.description: Sort intervals or extend reach as far as possible from current position → maximize tasks done / minimize steps.

problems.title: Minimum Number of Arrows to Burst Balloons
Minimum Number of Taps to Open to Water Garden

subtopics.title: Sorting / Local Choice
subtopics.description: Sort array or select elements → make locally optimal choice → achieve global optimum.

title: Dynamic Programming
description: Optimization method involving breaking down problems into simpler subproblems and storing their solutions.

subtopics.title: 1D / Linear DP
subtopics.description: Track optimal solution using a 1D array → sequences, sums, or counts.

subtopics.title: 2D / Grid DP
subtopics.description: Use 2D array → track states for row/column → movement or path constraints.

subtopics.title: DP on Strings
subtopics.description: Use 2D DP → index i,j represent substrings/subsequences → solve LCS, palindrome, or edit distance.

problems.title: Minimum Insertions to Make String Palindrome
Minimum Number of Insertions and Deletions

subtopics.title: DP on Intervals
subtopics.description: Track optimal solutions for subarrays/intervals → matrix chain, merging, or balloon burst patterns.

problems.title: Min cost to cut a stick

subtopics.title: DP on Trees / DAGs
subtopics.description: Recursion + memoization → track states along tree paths → post-order traversal.

problems.title: Maximum Sum BST in Binary Tree

subtopics.title: Knapsack / Subset Sum
subtopics.description: Track states based on weight/value → classic 0-1 / bounded / unbounded variants.

subtopics.title: DP on Stocks
subtopics.description: State machine DP to track whether you are holding a stock or not.

problems.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock II
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Cooldown
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Transaction Fee
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock III
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock IV

title: Trie
description: Tree-based data structure used for efficiently storing and retrieving keys in a dataset of strings.

subtopics.title: Basic Trie Operations
subtopics.description: Build Trie → insert words → search full word or prefix efficiently → collect suggestions in lexicographic order.

subtopics.title: Word Break / Segmentation
subtopics.description: Use Trie for fast lookup → combine with DP or backtracking for word segmentation and concatenation.

subtopics.title: Bitwise Trie / XOR
subtopics.description: Use Trie for binary representation of numbers → efficiently find maximum/minimum XOR or subset XOR.

problems.title: Maximum XOR of Two Numbers in Array
Maximum XOR With an Element From Array

title: Bit Manipulation
description: Techniques that perform operations on data at the bit level.

subtopics.title: Basic Bit Operations
subtopics.description: Use XOR / AND / OR / shift operations → detect single/missing numbers or count bits efficiently.

problems.title: Check kth bit is set or not

subtopics.title: Subsets / Bitmask
subtopics.description: Iterate through all subsets using bits → solve combinatorial or DP counting problems.

problems.title: Partition to K Equal Sum Subsets

subtopics.title: Advanced XOR
subtopics.description: Use XOR properties → maximize/minimize XOR over array/subarray or ranges.

problems.title: Maximum XOR of Two Numbers in Array
Maximum XOR With an Element From Array
